sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52845" key="kalo/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κᾰλότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n52845.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κάλλος</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">beauty</tr_>, a word formed by <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:3:60" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.60</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
